description: Create a complex GitHub Actions workflow that triggers on workflow dispatch, push to master or tags matching v*, and pull requests to master. The workflow has two jobs: 'release' and 'build'. The 'release' job runs on ubuntu-22.04, checks out the code, parses the changelog, gets the XCSoar version, and creates a release. The 'build' job runs on multiple platforms, needs the 'release' job, and performs various build and compilation tasks.
